meta.transformationNotes: Expenditure sourced from CTHRU (Massachusetts Statewide Accounting System) department-level actuals for the reporting month via Socrata API. Revenue sourced from Massachusetts DOR monthly revenue report, aggregated by tax type. Federal reimbursements (primarily MassHealth FMAP) included in the relevant department lines. Amounts in whole dollars; intra-governmental transfers excluded.
